testcase.name: test_user_has_department_ids_populated

failure.message: AssertionError: {'course_ids': None, 'created_at': '2026-07-05T13:12:07.818000', 'department_id': '698e500997fef774e66e93a8', 'department_ids': None, ...} assert '698e500997fef774e66e93a8' in ((None or [])) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffcbeb8c4280>('department_ids') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffcbeb8c4280> = {'course_ids': None, 'created_at': '2026-07-05T13:12:07.818000', 'department_id': '698e500997fef774e66e93a8', 'department_ids': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teaching_load_multi_dept_scope.py:188: in test_user_has_department_ids_populated assert multi_dept_user["dept_a"] in (me.get("department_ids") or []), me E AssertionError: {'course_ids': None, 'created_at': '2026-07-05T13:12:07.818000', 'department_id': '698e500997fef774e66e93a8', 'department_ids': None, ...} E assert '698e500997fef774e66e93a8' in ((None or [])) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffcbeb8c4280>('department_ids') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffcbeb8c4280> = {'course_ids': None, 'created_at': '2026-07-05T13:12:07.818000', 'department_id': '698e500997fef774e66e93a8', 'department_ids': None, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_can_assign_and_delete_in_dept_b
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teaching_load_multi_dept_scope.py:209: in test_can_assign_and_delete_in_dept_b assert r.status_code == 200, f"multi-dept user should assign in dept_b: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: multi-dept user should assign in dept_b: 403 {"detail":"لا يمكنك إسناد مقرر لا ينتمي لأحد أقسامك"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

skipped.message: No active course inside Saeed's dept
